title: phlomoides uralensis
intro: Phlomoides uralensis, also known as Ural Mountain phlomis or Phlomoides, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides uralensis include relieving gastrointestinal issues, fever reduction, and anti-anxiety effects. Herbal preparations of Phlomoides uralensis typically involve infusion of the leaves in hot water, often used as a tea to leverage its medicinal properties.
